puj: Tõ Thêng-hái-kūiⁿ ũ chék-kâi siù-tsâi, ũ huãm-tiéh-lút
han: 在澄海縣有一個秀才。有犯着律
han_orig: 在澄海縣有壹個秀才。有犯着律
en: There was a graduate in the district of Theng-hai, who had broken the law.
source: 001_Handbook_of_the_Swatow_Vernacular > Lesson XXXI. Notes—Judicial.

puj: Tõ tsóu-ke chék-nîⁿ Tshun--thiⁿ sĩ siãng-hó
han: 在祖家一年春天是上好
han_orig: 在祖家壹年春天是上好
en: In England Spring is the best of the year.
source: 001_Handbook_of_the_Swatow_Vernacular > section III.

puj: Tõ Tsóu-ke Hē--thiⁿ bô chié hièⁿ-zuáh
han: 在祖家夏天無此塊彼樣熱
han_orig: 在祖家夏天無此處向熱
en: In England the Summer is not so hot as here.
source: 001_Handbook_of_the_Swatow_Vernacular > section III.

puj: Tõ Tsóu-ke ũ ke-ke tsṳ-niêⁿ, gâu kùe ta-pou
han: 在祖家有加加諸娘。賢[訓]過丈夫
han_orig: 在祖家有多多女人。賢[訓]過男人
en: There are many ladies in England cleverer than men.
source: 001_Handbook_of_the_Swatow_Vernacular > section I.

en: From which shop have you just bought them?
source: 001_Handbook_of_the_Swatow_Vernacular > Lesson XXX. Notes—Commercial.

en: Here can be put a square table.
source: 001_Handbook_of_the_Swatow_Vernacular > Lesson XIV. household furniture &c.

puj: Tõ-hié kâi phâu-thâi lông-tsóng khṳt i kâi chiên-tsûn bū tiòu
han: 在彼塊个炮臺攏總乞伊个戰船霧掉
han_orig: 在彼個炮臺俱皆被伊個戰船霧丢
en: All the forts there have been bombarded by their war vessels.
source: 001_Handbook_of_the_Swatow_Vernacular > Lesson XXXII. Notes—Hostilities.

en: The shops there are high and large.
